properties.name: FormLayout
properties.description: Standard form/page shell: header slot, body slot, action-bar slot. Applies the global spacing and accessibility patterns to every screen.

properties.name: StatusBadge
properties.description: Compact badge that renders a MeetingStatus enum value with status-specific color/icon. Used in both catalog rows and detail headers.

properties.name: LanguageSelect
properties.description: Bilingual (RU/EN) selector with a 'blank = auto-detect' option. Renders as a select on input forms and as a read-only badge on display forms (controlled by isReadOnly prop).

properties.name: DurationFormat
properties.description: Formats a duration in seconds as a human-readable string (e.g., 4523 -> '1h 15m 23s'). Returns a placeholder when value is null (duration not yet extracted).

properties.name: ConfirmDialog
properties.description: Modal confirmation dialog with title, body, destructive/primary action variants. Used for meeting deletion (UC-003) and unsaved-changes warning in the protocol editor (UC-301 AS08).
properties.props: open, title, body, confirmLabel, cancelLabel, variant, onConfirm, onCancel

properties.name: NavMeetingCatalog
properties.description: Top-level route 'Meetings' (catalog). Default landing page for AUTHOR.

properties.name: NavMeetingUpload
properties.description: Top-level route 'Upload'. AUTHOR uploads a new meeting video.

properties.name: NavMeetingDetail
properties.description: Meeting detail route. Reached by clicking a row in the catalog. Not a top-level menu item.

properties.name: NavMeetingDeleteConfirm
properties.description: Delete-confirmation route (also rendered as modal overlay over the detail page). Not a menu item.

properties.name: NavTranscriptView
properties.description: Transcript view route. Reached via 'View transcript' link from meeting detail (gated by Meeting.status >= TRANSCRIPT_READY).
